kenaikanKelas.title: Grade Promotion
kenaikanKelas.guideDescription: This feature moves all students from one class group to a new class group in the next academic year. The process is safe — it does not delete existing data.
kenaikanKelas.tip1: Choose the source class group (e.g. X Science 1, AY 2024/2025), then set the destination class group (e.g. XI Science 1, AY 2025/2026).
kenaikanKelas.tip2: If the destination class group name does not exist yet, the system creates it automatically.
kenaikanKelas.tip3: Click the 👥 icon in the table to view the list of students in each class group.
kenaikanKelas.tip4: The table is sorted by recently created/updated class groups (newest first).
kenaikanKelas.headerDescription: Promote students from old class groups to new ones in the next academic year.
kenaikanKelas.successMessage: Successfully moved {count} students to class group {rombel}.
kenaikanKelas.formDescription: Select the source class group, set the destination, then click the button.
kenaikanKelas.step1Empty: — select the class group to promote —
kenaikanKelas.namaRombelHint: If a class group with this name already exists in the destination year, students will be added to it.
kenaikanKelas.warning1: This operation adds members to the new class group — it does not remove existing members
kenaikanKelas.warning2: Students already in the destination class group will not be duplicated
kenaikanKelas.warning3: The process can be repeated if needed
